assertions.text: Produces a native Word (Docx) document using python-docx.
Selects the appropriate Office format based on the request rather than defaulting to HTML.

cases.prompt: Create an xlsx with multiple sheets and a pptx summary

assertions.text: Generates a multi-sheet Xlsx via openpyxl.
Recognizes web HTML belongs to /design-html (and presentation HTML to /slides), not native Office formats.
